input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8879 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.conscrypt:conscrypt-openjdk-uber:1.4.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Conscrypt coverage should exercise provider creation and JNI-backed APIs so `Conscrypt.checkAvailability()` and native library extraction are reached; failures there are likely metadata/native-image issues rather than setup gaps.
Tests that perform real TLS/network validation can become flaky if they depend on external hosts or host trust stores; prefer loopback or in-memory certificates.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The uber artifact has no Maven dependencies and bundles the platform JNI libraries needed for normal Conscrypt provider/JSSE usage; no Docker service or mandatory environment/system property is required before meaningful coverage.
